MANDATORY_RULE: Synapse MCP MUST be available before starting ANY batch. If mcp__synapse_sql__execute_sql_read_only is not in your tools list or fails, ABORT IMMEDIATELY. Do NOT proceed without MCP. Do NOT use prior batch context as a substitute for live data. Batches 3-6 ran without MCP which produced INCOMPLETE documentation — this is now PROHIBITED.
session_notes_batch18: Batch 18 completed (wiki-only mode, live MCP). 1 new object discovered during SSDT re-scan: eMoney_Dictionary_TransactionCategory. 3 cols (TransactionCategoryID int, TransactionCategory varchar(50), UpdateDate datetime), REPLICATE HEAP. Static reference table: 5 rows loaded once 2023-06-12, all same UpdateDate. Values: 0=Unknown, 1=CardTransaction, 2=BankingTransaction, 3=TransferTransaction, 4=BalanceAdjustmentTransaction. Upstream: FiatDwhDB.Dictionary.TransactionCategories (BankingDBs repo). No writer SP in eMoney_dbo — SP_eMoney_DimFact_Transaction uses External_FiatDwhDB_Dictionary_TransactionCategories (live FiatDwhDB external table) instead; this local copy is for ad-hoc analyst use. TransactionCategoryID←Id (T1), TransactionCategory←Name (T1), UpdateDate←manual timestamp (T2). Quality: 9.0/10, adversarial: 9.15/10. SCHEMA COMPLETE — all 49 active objects documented.
session_notes_batch14: Batch 14 completed (wiki-only mode, live MCP). 4 objects. eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary: 18 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, 130,301 rows, 94,556 distinct CIDs (37.8% have 2+ instances); TRUNCATE+INSERT daily by SP_eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary (created 2025-05-27, NOT in Execute_Group_One); 5-step pipeline (FiatCardStatuses+FiatCardInstances+CopyFromLake→#Step1 status summary→#Step2 account+card join+FMI→#Step3 NextActivationDateTime→#Step4 StatusByHighestRNDasc→#Step5 TxAfterActivationCount); GCID_Unique_Count=1 filter; 45.9% NULL InstanceActivationDate (never activated); InstanceStatus: NotActivated=32.9%, Activated=29.8%, Expired=21.8%, Blocked=11.2%; StatusByHighestRNDasc: Activated=42.0%, Expired=28.6%, NotActivated=23.9%; TxAfterActivationCount range 0-4150 avg 20.7; 6 T1 (CID, ProviderHolderID, DWH_CardID, DWH_CardInstanceId, MaskedPAN, InstanceExpirationDate) / 12 T2; PII: MaskedPAN excluded from v_eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary; 8.9/10. eMoney_Card_Monthly_Snapshot: 23 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, 566,088,274 rows, 27 EOM snapshots 2024-01-31→2026-03-31; while-loop DELETE WHERE SnapShotDateID + INSERT by SP_eMoney_Card_Monthly_Snapshot (2025-06-29); sources Fact_SnapshotCustomer+Dim_Country_Rollout+Dim_PlayerLevel+Dim_Country+Dim_Range+eMoney_Dim_Account+eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary+Dim_Customer+eMoney_Dim_Transaction; Mar 2026: 24.9M rows, UK=4.9M France=3.9M Germany=3.6M Italy=2.9M Spain=1.7M (34 countries), Bronze=97.5% Silver=0.9% Gold=0.8%; card penetration ~0.35%; Snapshot* cols = point-in-time EOM, Country/Club = current at SP run; 2 T1 (CID, GCID) / 21 T2; 9.0/10. eMoney_Snapshot_Settled_Balance: 27 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, 1,287,999 rows (DateID=20260411); TRUNCATE+INSERT daily for GETDATE()-1; 4 currencies: EUR=832,610 GBP=434,329 AUD=20,629 DKK=431; 733,266 zero-balance rows (56.9%); HolderBalance range -597,857 to +999,629; TotalMI=CardTxMI+IBANInMI+IBANOutMI+DirectDebitMI+OtherMI; DKK has NULL USD approx; ~544 duplicate AccountIDs (SP join bug); 3 T1 (AccountID, GCID, CID) / 24 T2; 8.9/10. eMoney_BankPaymentsUK: 18 cols, HASH(TransactionId) CCI (unique in eMoney_dbo!), 468,632 rows 2025-12-21→2026-04-11 (112 days); incremental DELETE WHERE Created + INSERT from SP_eMoney_Reconciliation_ETLs; GBP-only; 4 BankActivityType values: BankPayIns-External (TC 57/59/68, 66%), BankPayOuts-External (TC 56/58, 34%), BankPayOuts-DebitAdj (TC 11, 0.1%), BankPayOuts-BankingReturn (TC 66, 0.02%); DebitAdj+BankingReturn have positive HolderAmount (credits from corrections); 102,877 distinct HolderIds; no CID/GCID direct (join via AccountId); BankAccountNumber is PII; 2 T1 (AccountId, ExternalBankAccountId) / 16 T2; 8.8/10. Slot accounting: 2.0+2.0+1.0+1.0=6.0 slots.
session_notes_batch13: Batch 13 completed (wiki-only mode, live MCP). 4 objects. eMoney_Reports_ClubUpgrade: 13 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, 1,178,170 rows (2023-01-01 to 2026-04-11); SP_eMoney_Reports_Daily Steps 8-11, TRUNCATE+INSERT daily; sources Dim_Customer+Fact_SnapshotCustomer+Dim_PlayerLevel+Dim_Range+Dim_Date+eMoney_Dim_Account+eMoney_Dim_Country_Rollout; Club IDs 0=N/A,1=Bronze,2=Platinum,3=Gold,5=Silver,6=Platinum+,7=Diamond; Is_eTM from eMoney_Dim_Account (current-state flag, not historical); UK/EU=EU includes AUS+DK+NO; Club_Upgrade_Date=FromDateID not exact moment; SP hardcodes FromDateID>=20230101; Previous_ClubID=0=first assignment; 2 T1 / 11 T2; 8.8/10. eMoney_Account_Mappings: 24 cols, HASH(GCID) HEAP, 2,034,012 rows; SP_eMoney_Account_Mappings Step4 DELETE+INSERT (not TRUNCATE — preserves identity); sources FiatCurrencyBalances+CurrencyBalancesProvidersMapping+eMoney_Dictionary_Provider+FiatBankAccount+FiatAccount+eMoney_Dictionary_AccountProgram+eMoney_Dictionary_AccountSubProgram+AccountsProviderHoldersMapping+FiatCards+CardsProvidersMapping; 20 T1 from FiatDwhDB upstream wikis / 4 T2; PII: BankAccountName/Number/IBAN (DDM-masked in source, no DDM in Synapse); 227 NULL ProviderDesc rows; CardID NULL for IBAN accounts; 9.1/10. eMoney_Currency_Instrument_Mapping_Static: 10 cols, ROUND_ROBIN HEAP, 145 rows (21 currencies × FX pairs); manual insert 2022-11-21 (static, never refreshed); USD=52 pairs, GBP=11, EUR=15, AUD=9; InstrumentID=DWHInstrumentID verified; FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Instrument; read by SP_eMoney_Dim_Account+SP_eMoney_Snapshot_Settled_Balance+SP_eMoney_Calculated_Balance; RUB present (2 pairs); 0 T1 / 10 T2; 9.3/10. eMoney_EntityByCurrencyISO_MappingStatic: 7 cols, ROUND_ROBIN HEAP, 4 rows; AUD→eToro Money AUS/InstrID=7/RepCur=AUD, DKK→eToro Money Malta/InstrID=75/RepCur=EUR, GBP→eToro Money UK/InstrID=2/RepCur=GBP, EUR→eToro Money Malta/InstrID=1/RepCur=EUR; manual load 2025-09-29 (AUD/GBP/EUR) + 2025-11-26 (DKK added); no writer SP; commented-out UPDATE in SP_eMoney_ClientBalance (dev artifact, not executed); DKK reports in EUR (eToro Money Malta EU entity); used by SP_eMoney_Dim_Account (ISNULL(ee.Entity,'N/A')), SP_eMoney_ClientBalance, SP_eMoney_Aggregated_Tribe_Balance, SP_eMoney_Reconciliation_ETLs; 0 T1 / 7 T2; 9.5/10. Slot accounting: 2.0+2.0+0.5+0.5=5.0 slots.
session_notes_batch12: Batch 12 completed (wiki-only mode, live MCP). 4 objects. eMoney_Dim_Country_Rollout: 7 cols, REPLICATE HEAP, 34 rows; SP_eMoney_Dim_Country_Rollout DELETE+INSERT daily; CountryID hardcoded CASE WHEN for launch dates (2020-11-11 UK to 2024-12-10 AUS); source DWH_dbo.Dim_Country (no wiki → all passthrough cols Tier 4); 3 T2 / 4 T4; 8.5/10. eMoney_Reports_AcquisitionFunnel: 15 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, 3,672,801 rows (2026-04-12); SP_eMoney_Reports_Daily Steps 1-4, TRUNCATE+INSERT daily; 9 boolean flags (IseMoneyAccount, IsFMI, IsFMO, IsActiveMIMO, IsCardCreated, IsCardActivated, IsCardFirstTx, IsValidForFunnel=0 for 710 rows); CID/GCID T1 from eMoney_Dim_Account wiki; 2 T1 / 13 T2; 8.9/10. eMoney_Reports_AcquisitionFunnelAggregated: 5 cols, REPLICATE HEAP, 1,863 rows = 9 stages × 207 Country+Club combos; SP_eMoney_Reports_Daily Steps 5-6, TRUNCATE+INSERT; 9 UNION ALL blocks with hardcoded FunnelStage strings; all T2; 9.0/10. eMoney_Panel_FirstDates: 65 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, 2,031,884 rows (2,031,882 distinct CIDs); SP_eMoney_Panel_FirstDates 8-step pipeline DELETE+INSERT daily; GCID_Unique_Count=1 grain filter (added 2026-01-12 Shachar Rubin); FMI=TxTypeID IN (5,7) TxStatusID=2; FMO=TxTypeID IN (1,2,3,4,6,8,13); 3 seniority cols DATEDIFF(MONTH); 15 general+15 IBAN+15 card action cols (ROW_NUMBER top-5 pivot); UC format parquet (not delta); FMI 63.3%, FMO 61.1%, CardActivated 1.3%; 3 T1 / 62 T2; 9.0/10. Slot accounting: 1.0+1.0+0.5+2.0=4.5 slots.
session_notes_batch10: Batch 10 completed. CRA cluster rebuild (revoked batch 6 objects, rebuilt with live MCP). eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment (120 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, 2,031,882 rows, 2024-07-17 to 2026-04-12): SP_eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment 1729 lines, 32-step pipeline, TRUNCATE+INSERT daily (changed 2024-07-22 by EitanLi from DELETE). 32-parameter weighted AML scoring via Fivetran classification table (emoney_customer_risk_assessment_classification_table); dynamic thresholds @RiskLowerCut/@RiskUpperCut from ParameterID=98/99; Risk_Final_Result=SUM(Pn_RiskID×Pn_Weight). P10 PERMANENTLY CANCELLED (always NULL). Override: PEP→High, Manual→custom (Google Sheets). 5 Tier 1 (CID←RealCID, GCID, VerificationLevelID, DateOfBirth←BirthDate CAST, DateOfReg←RegisteredReal CAST) from Customer.CustomerStatic/BackOffice.Customer via Dim_Customer.md. 115 Tier 2. ClientRisk: Low=76.3%, Medium=21.8%, High=1.7%, Error=0.1%. eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment_History (120 cols identical schema, append-only): 8,113,383 rows, avg 3.99/CID, max 387. Insert trigger: WHERE trg.CID IS NULL OR src.ClientRisk<>trg.ClientRisk (class-change-only, reverted 2025-03-12 by Ofir Ovadia from score-change). Score-change anomaly rows exist from 2025-02-25 to 2025-03-12. Self-referential loop: Step 27 reads History BEFORE Steps 30-31 truncate/rebuild CRA snapshot. Slot accounting: 3.0+3.0=6.0 slots. Quality: CRA 9.0/10, History 9.2/10.
session_notes_batch8: Batch 8 completed. 6 SIMPLE-DICT fast-path tables (MCP live, FiatDwhDB upstream wikis): AccountProgram (3 rows, T1×2), AccountStatus (3 rows, T1×2), Provider (1 row Tribe-only, T1×2), TransactionStatus (6/8 rows — IDs 6=Reserved+7=Cancelled missing, HIGH flag), TransactionType (15 rows 0-14=CryptoToFiat, FMI/FMO/CB groupings from SP_eMoney_Calculated_Balance, T1×2), AccountSubProgram (5 cols, 10/16 rows — IDs 11-16 AUS/DK missing, HIGH flag; source=FiatDwhDB.dbo.SubPrograms NOT Dictionary schema, Region col dropped). eMoneyClientBalance: 72 cols live (SSDT stale at 45); 28 new RepCur+FX cols added 2026-01-20 via ALTER TABLE; 1.19B rows 2023-12-29 to 2026-04-12; SP_eMoney_ClientBalance 1073 lines; HASH(AccountId) COLUMNSTORE; IsExistingUser confirmed T2 from SP line 706; Entity distribution Malta+UK+AUS+'New' 131 rows. eMoney_Calculated_Balance: 48 cols matches SSDT; STALE MaxDate=2025-06-09 (~10 months); SP_eMoney_Calculated_Balance 529 lines; ClosingBalance=TotalBalance (cumulative); CardID+ProviderCardID+IsGermanBaFin always NULL; HASH(CID) CLUSTERED INDEX(BalanceDateID). Slot accounting: 6×0.5+1.5+2.0=6.5 slots. All objects on-disk.
session_notes: Batch 6 completed. AML/CRA cluster: eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment (120 cols, SP_eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment 1730 lines, 32-step pipeline, daily TRUNCATE+INSERT, 32-parameter weighted composite AML scoring via Google Sheets / Fivetran classification table, 4 Tier 1 from Customer.CustomerStatic, P10 CANCELLED always NULL, override logic Step 29 — manual+PEP, P20-P26/P32 IBAN MIMO descriptions pending SP lines 640-870). eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment_History (120 cols identical schema, append-only, conditional INSERT WHERE trg.CID IS NULL OR src.ClientRisk<>trg.ClientRisk, class-change-only trigger since 2025-03-12 rollback from score-change due to Tribe volume constraints, self-referential loop: Step 27 reads History for PreviousClientRisk, Step 32 writes back to History). WARNING: this batch ran without MCP which is now PROHIBITED — all future batches MUST have live MCP or abort. Slot accounting: 3.0+3.0=6.0 slots.
session_notes_batch5: Batch 5 completed. Card cluster: Card_Instance_Summary (18 cols, 5-step SP, 3 Tier 1 from FiatCardInstances — Id→DWH_CardInstanceId, MaskedPAN, CardExpirationDate→InstanceExpirationDate; RNDasc activation-order logic; TxAfterActivationCount window between instances), v_eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary (17-col SELECT wrapper; excludes MaskedPAN; CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE avoided here), Card_Monthly_Snapshot (23 cols, WHILE loop monthly from 2024-01-31; MAX aggregation for last instance; Snapshot vs current Country/Club duality). Snapshot_Settled_Balance (27 cols, TRUNCATE+INSERT, cumulative all-time balance, TxType breakdown, TxTypeID=14 CryptoToFiat gap flagged). BankPaymentsUK (18 cols, CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE, GBP-only from Tribe AccountsActivities, 6-value BankActivityType CASE, CAST float bug on TransactionId flagged, added 2025-12-21 by Inessa). Aggregated_Tribe_Balance (28 cols 3 added 2025-09 for AUS, Tribe AccountSnapshot daily aggregate, ExistingUser DWH linkage, CASS/NegativeBalances separation, @d param unused, CASE tautology bug, COALESCE d1/d1 bug flagged). WARNING: this batch ran without MCP which is now PROHIBITED — all future batches MUST have live MCP or abort. Slot accounting: 2.0+0.7+1.0+1.0+0.5+0.5=5.7 slots.
session_notes_batch4: Batch 4 completed. 6 dictionaries (Generic Pipeline fast-path + FiatDwhDB upstream wikis): AuthorizationType (15 vals), CardStatus (9 vals), CurrencyBalanceStatus (5 vals), PaymentSchemaType (8 vals, SEPAstandart typo preserved), PaymentSpecificationType (2 vals), TribeScriptStatus (3 vals). 4 static reference tables: Country_Codes_Mapping_ISO (6 cols, ISO 3166-1 bridge), Currency_Mapping_ISO (4 cols, ISO 4217 alpha-3 ↔ numeric), EntityByCurrencyISO_MappingStatic (7 cols, entity → reporting currency; migration artifacts in SP comment block), Currency_Instrument_Mapping_Static (10 cols, CurrencyISO → InstrumentID, SellCurrencyID=1=USD assumption). Account_Mappings: 24 cols all Tier 2, SP_eMoney_Account_Mappings (168 lines) DELETE+INSERT; all sources eMoney_dbo tables. WARNING: this batch ran without MCP which is now PROHIBITED — all future batches MUST have live MCP or abort. Slot accounting: 6×0.5+4×0.5+1.5=6.5 slots.
session_notes_batch3: Batch 3 completed. SP sources: SP_eMoney_Dim_Country_Rollout (122 lines) for Dim_Country_Rollout; SP_eMoney_Panel_FirstDates (469 lines) for Panel_FirstDates (GCID_Unique_Count=1 filter added 2026-01-12 by Shachar Rubin); SP_eMoney_Reports_Daily (343 lines) for all 3 report tables. CountryID=83 anomaly in SP_eMoney_Dim_Country_Rollout: appears in CASE WHEN but not in WHERE clause — orphaned/dead reference. FMI=TxTypeID IN (5,7), FMO=TxTypeID IN (1,2,3,4,6,8,13); both require TxStatusID=2 and HolderAmount<>0. UK/EU hardcoded: CountryID=218='UK'. WARNING: this batch ran without MCP which is now PROHIBITED — all future batches MUST have live MCP or abort. Slot accounting: 1.0+2.0+1.0+0.5+1.5=6.0 slots.

objects.is_existing_user_derivation: CASE WHEN COALESCE(d.GCID, d1.GCID) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END (SP line 706)

objects.account_status_values: A=Active (92.3%), S=Suspended (6.5%), B=Blocked (0.55%), P=Spend only (0.53%), R=Receive only (0.05%)

objects.name: eMoney_Calculated_Balance

objects.name: eMoney_Panel_FirstDates

objects.fmo_definition: TxTypeID IN (1,2,3,4,6,8,13) AND TxStatusID=2 AND HolderAmount<>0

objects.name: eMoney_Reports_AcquisitionFunnelAggregated
objects.etl_pattern: Daily TRUNCATE+INSERT; 9-part UNION ALL SELECT FunnelStage, Country, Club, SUM(FlagCol), GETDATE() FROM eMoney_Reports_AcquisitionFunnel

objects.name: eMoney_Reports_ClubUpgrade
objects.etl_pattern: Daily TRUNCATE+INSERT (changed from DELETE July 2024); LAG(PlayerLevelID,1,0) OVER (PARTITION BY RealCID ORDER BY FromDateID) detects Sort increase; DATE window >= 20230101
objects.uk_eu_hardcoded: CountryID=218='UK'; all other eToro Money countries='EU'
objects.lag_default_risk: LAG default=0; if PlayerLevelID=0 not in Dim_PlayerLevel, first-ever snapshots silently excluded
objects.column_name_issue: [UK/EU] requires bracket-quoting in all SQL references

session_notes_batch11: Batch 11 completed. CRITICAL CORRECTION: Batch 4 ran without MCP — all 8 revoked objects were rebuilt using live MCP data exclusively. Prior batch_4 enum values in this context were WRONG: AuthorizationType had CardPayment/Contactless/etc (should be Normal/PreAuthorize/etc); CardStatus had Active/Frozen/Deleted (should be NotActivated/Activated/Blocked/Suspended/Risk/Stolen/Lost/Expired/Fraud); CurrencyBalanceStatus had Active/Suspended/Deleted/Closed (should be Active/ReceiveOnly/SpendOnly/Suspended/Blocked); PaymentSchemaType had wrong ordering and values. All corrected by batch 11 live MCP. Batch 11 objects: 6 SIMPLE-DICT fast-path dictionaries (AuthorizationType 15 vals, CardStatus 9 vals, CurrencyBalanceStatus 5 vals, PaymentSchemaType 8 vals SEPAstandart typo preserved, PaymentSpecificationType 2 vals, TribeScriptStatus 3 vals) + 2 static ISO reference tables (Country_Codes_Mapping_ISO 248 rows ISO 3166-1, Currency_Mapping_ISO 168 rows ISO 4217). UpdateDate: dictionaries 2023-06-12 except PaymentSchemaType 2023-06-11; ISO tables 2024-06-24. Slot accounting: 8×0.5=4.0 slots. All 8 objects on-disk with 3 files each. P16 adversarial: PASS.

objects.key_notes: SP_eMoney_Card_Monthly_Snapshot references this view; all descriptions verbatim-inherited from base table

objects.name: eMoney_Card_Monthly_Snapshot
objects.etl_pattern: WHILE loop monthly from 2024-01-31 seed; incremental watermark MAX(SnapshotMonth); DELETE+INSERT per month
objects.key_notes: MAX agg for LastInstance cols (multi-instance same-month ambiguity); SnapshotCountry/Club from v_eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary (creation-time) vs Country/Club from current Fact_SnapshotCustomer (reporting-time) — semantic duality flagged

objects.name: eMoney_Snapshot_Settled_Balance
objects.upstream_wiki: none (DWH-native balance snapshot from Tribe staging)
objects.etl_pattern: Daily TRUNCATE+INSERT; cumulative all-time (no date filter); DELETE→TRUNCATE June 2024 (Eitan Lipovetsky)
objects.known_gap: TxTypeID=14 (CryptoToFiat) uncategorized — silently falls into Other

objects.name: eMoney_BankPaymentsUK
objects.upstream_wiki: none (DWH-native GBP bank payment subledger from Tribe AccountsActivities)
objects.etl_pattern: Incremental DELETE WHERE Created>=@AccountActivities_DATE; INSERT WHERE Network IN ('Internal Payment','External Payment') AND HolderCurrencyAlpha='GBP' AND TransactionCode NOT IN (6,14,15,24,25,64)
objects.index: CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX (unique in eMoney_dbo schema; added 2025-12-21 by Inessa Kontorovich)
objects.known_bug: CAST(TransactionId AS FLOAT) before CAST to bigint — precision loss risk for large integer TransactionIds
objects.bank_activity_type_values: Internal Incoming, Internal Outgoing, Faster Payments Incoming, Faster Payments Outgoing, BACS Incoming, BACS Outgoing

objects.name: eMoney_Aggregated_Tribe_Balance
objects.upstream_wiki: none (DWH-native daily aggregate from Tribe AccountSnapshot)
objects.etl_pattern: Incremental DELETE WHERE BalanceDateID>=MIN(@BalanceDateID); INSERT from ETL_AccountSnapshot grouped by entity/program/status
objects.key_notes: 3 cols added Sept 2025 for AUS entity (CurrencyIson, HolderCurrency, IsTest); CASS vs NegativeBalances separation; ExistingUser = DWH linkage flag

sp_bugs.case_tautology: @ReportDateID CASE both branches return @AGGDateID — incremental window may be wrong
sp_bugs.coalesce_d1d1: COALESCE(d1.AccountSubProgram, d1.AccountSubProgram) — d2 fallback never used
sp_bugs.dead_code: #ISO_Mapping built every run but USD conversion commented out

session_notes_batch7: Batch 7 completed. MCP AVAILABLE (SELECT 1 pre-flight passed). Retention cluster: eMoney_Panel_Retention_Daily (86 cols, HASH(CID), HEAP; SP_eMoney_Panel_Retention 703 lines; WHILE loop incremental from MAX(Report_Date); FundingTypeID=33 discriminator eMoney vs Other; ActionTypeID 7=Deposit 8=CO; LT/3M/Monthly windows; tier thresholds: 0=eMoney_Inactive ≤0.8=Low_Active >0.8=High_Active No_MIMO for window-bound; ClubCategory: NoClub=1 LowClub=3/5 HighClub=2/6/7; Seniority=DATEDIFF days from milestone dates; all 86 cols Tier 2; 0 Tier 1 correct for DWH-native analytics aggregation; 786M rows 2022-01-01 to 2026-04-11; ~1.3M per day). eMoney_Panel_Retention_Monthly (86 cols same schema; Report_Month=int YYYYMM replaces Report_Date; Date_for_Report=date EOM snapshot replaces Report_Date_ID; rebuilt by TRUNCATE+INSERT at end of SP run from Daily EOM rows; 27M rows 202201-202604; ~530K per month). eMoney_Risk_Portfolio (79 cols NOT 81 as estimated; HASH(RealCID); CLUSTERED INDEX(ReportDateID ASC); SP_eMoney_Risk_Portfolio 866 lines; WHILE loop daily from 2023-12-01; TurnOverRisk: Low<50K/Medium 50K-250K/High≥250K; MoneyInRisk/MoneyOutRisk: Low=TP/Medium=banking; eMoneyRisk=combined; OverallRisk=max(eMoney,Trading); TxTypeID mapping: 5=MoneyInFromTP 6=MoneyOutToTP 7=MoneyInBankingPayments 8=MoneyOutBankingPayments; ~36% NULL risk scores for no-transaction accounts; 7 Tier 1 from eMoney_Dim_Account (GCID dbo.FiatAccount, RealCID Customer.CustomerStatic, CurrencyBalanceID dbo.FiatCurrencyBalances, AccountID dbo.FiatAccount, AccountStatusID dbo.FiatAccountStatuses, PlayerStatusID/PlayerLevelID Customer.CustomerStatic); 1.2B rows 2023-12-01 to 2026-04-11 ~2M per day). File status check: batches 2-6 have _batch_context.json entries but NO wiki files on disk — those 28 objects remain Pending and need file regeneration. Batch 7 adds 3 new on-disk wiki sets; total on-disk documented objects = 7. MCP slot accounting: 2.0+2.0+2.0=6.0 slots.

objects.name: eMoney_Panel_Retention_Daily
objects.etl_pattern: WHILE loop incremental from MAX(Report_Date); DELETE+INSERT per date

objects.name: eMoney_Panel_Retention_Monthly
objects.etl_pattern: TRUNCATE+INSERT at end of SP run; selects EOM rows from Daily via #RelDays = MAX(Report_Date) GROUP BY year*100+month
objects.col_differences_from_daily: Report_Month (int YYYYMM) replaces Report_Date; Date_for_Report (date EOM) replaces Report_Date_ID
objects.eom_semantics: Date_for_Report = MAX(Report_Date) per calendar month; current month row reflects partial data

objects.name: eMoney_Risk_Portfolio
objects.etl_pattern: WHILE loop daily from 2023-12-01; DELETE+INSERT per date
objects.null_rate: ~36% NULL risk scores (no eMoney transactions as of ReportDate)

session_notes_batch9: Batch 9 completed. AML/CRA cluster (redo of batch 6 with live MCP). eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment (120 cols, HASH(CID) HEAP, TRUNCATE+INSERT daily, 32-step SP, 2,031,882 rows, 2024-07-17 to 2026-04-12, T1=5 from DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer passthroughs: CID←RealCID, GCID, VerificationLevelID←BackOffice.Customer, DateOfBirth←CAST(BirthDate AS DATE), DateOfReg←CAST(RegisteredReal AS DATE), T2=115 all others). eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment_History (120 cols identical schema, append-only class-change-only conditional INSERT Step 32, 8,113,383 rows 2,031,882 distinct CIDs, 2024-07-17 to 2026-04-12, ~4 rows/CID avg, 45.2% have 3-5 rows). Key facts: P10 CANCELLED always NULL; dynamic thresholds from Fivetran classification table ParameterID=98/99; score-change trigger period 2025-02-25 to 2025-03-12 before revert; self-referential loop Step27 reads History for PreviousClientRisk before Step31 writes snapshot then Step32 writes back to History; 32 parameters grouped into 12 categories; ClientRisk dist: Low=76.3%/Med=21.8%/High=1.7%/Error=0.1% in snapshot; Risk_Final_Result=float (sum of RiskID×Weight). Slot accounting: 3.0+3.0=6.0 slots.

objects.name: eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment
objects.etl_pattern: Daily TRUNCATE TABLE + INSERT (changed from DELETE 2024-07-22); runs separately from Group One
objects.dynamic_thresholds: ParameterID=98 (@RiskLowerCut), ParameterID=99 (@RiskUpperCut) from Fivetran classification table
objects.risk_score_type: float (sum of P_RiskID x P_Weight for all 32 parameters)

parameter_groups.P20-P26,P32: IBAN MIMO (load/unload countries, HRC, volume, HNWI)

objects.name: eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment_History
objects.cross_object_note: All 120 column descriptions verbatim-identical to eMoney_Customer_Risk_Assessment per cross-object consistency rule
objects.etl_pattern: Conditional INSERT (class-change-only): WHERE trg.CID IS NULL OR src.ClientRisk <> trg.ClientRisk
objects.self_referential_loop: Step 27 reads History for PreviousClientRisk before Step 31 writes snapshot; Step 32 then writes back to History

batch_11.note: All batch 4 objects REVOKED and rebuilt with live MCP. Prior context enum values were WRONG — see session_notes_batch11.

objects.name: eMoney_Dictionary_PaymentSchemaType
objects.known_issue: SEPAstandart (ID=5) is a typo preserved verbatim from FiatDwhDB source

objects.name: eMoney_Dim_Country_Rollout
objects.etl_pattern: DELETE + INSERT daily

objects.etl_pattern: TRUNCATE + INSERT daily (Steps 1-4)

objects.name: eMoney_Reports_AcquisitionFunnelAggregated

objects.funnel_stages: VerifiedFTD(3672801), IsVerifiedFTDPlus2Weeks(3659851), IseMoneyAccount(1726054), IsFMI(1201484), IsFMO(1160237), IsActiveMIMO(449123), IsCardCreated(89823), IsCardActivated(26079), IsCardFirstTx(23690)

objects.name: eMoney_Panel_FirstDates
objects.etl_pattern: DELETE + INSERT daily (8 steps)

objects.name: eMoney_Reports_ClubUpgrade
objects.etl_pattern: TRUNCATE + INSERT daily (Steps 8-11 via #pop → #club_upgrade → #final)
objects.is_etm_note: Point-in-time current state flag from eMoney_Dim_Account — NOT historical at upgrade event time
objects.uk_eu_note: EU=non-UK eToro Money rollout countries including AUS, DK, NO — NOT EU regulatory segmentation
objects.previous_clubid_0_note: 0 = first-ever club assignment sentinel; not missing data

objects.name: eMoney_Account_Mappings
objects.etl_pattern: DELETE + INSERT (NOT TRUNCATE — preserves identity for FK constraints)
objects.pii_note: DDM-masked in FiatDwhDB source; no DDM in Synapse — access controls must be verified
objects.latest_only_pattern: Latest bank account per CurrencyBalanceId (ROW_NUMBER by EventTimestamp DESC=1); latest card per AccountId (ROW_NUMBER by Created DESC=1)
objects.card_null_note: CardID=NULL for IBAN accounts (no card issued)

objects.name: eMoney_Currency_Instrument_Mapping_Static
objects.etl_pattern: Manual one-time INSERT; no Generic Pipeline export
objects.instrument_id_note: InstrumentID = DWHInstrumentID for all 145 rows (verified live); redundant column kept for SP compatibility

objects.name: eMoney_EntityByCurrencyISO_MappingStatic
objects.writer_sp: none (manual DBA INSERT/UPDATE; commented-out UPDATE in SP_eMoney_ClientBalance is dev artifact, NOT executed)
objects.etl_pattern: Manual ad-hoc INSERT per jurisdiction launch
objects.dkk_reporting_note: DKK reports in EUR (eToro Money Malta EU entity) — InstrumentID=75 but ReportingInstrumentID=1

objects.name: eMoney_Aggregated_Tribe_Balance
objects.etl_pattern: DELETE+INSERT incremental by BalanceDateID
objects.grouping_dimensions: 16 (BalanceDateID, Entity, CurrencyISO, ClientStatus, AccountType, EntityType, Country, eMoney_Tier, IbanHolder, FiatAccount, CardHolder, Has_Card_Transaction, IsValidETM, IsQualifiedBalance, IsCASS, IsCASSBalances)
objects.cass_note: IsCASS = accounts currently subject to CASS segregation; IsCASSBalances = positive settled balances (regulatory ring-fenced); NegativeBalances = overdrawn amounts (regulatory exception tracking)

objects.name: eMoney_Daily_MIMO_New_Reports_Action
objects.etl_pattern: WHILE loop daily DELETE+INSERT per ActionDate
objects.action_type_filter: ActionTypeID IN (7,8) — Deposit and Cashout only
objects.type_of_iban_added: 2024-09-30 — new column added when SP was redirected

objects.name: eMoney_Reports_MIMO_Actions
objects.etl_pattern: FROZEN — historical DELETE+INSERT WHILE loop; last row 2024-10-12

objects.name: eMoney_Daily_Shortfall_CID_Level
objects.etl_pattern: DELETE+INSERT by DateID; idempotent daily
objects.shortfall_formula: BankPayIns + BankPayOuts + Card_POS + Card_ATM + BalanceAdjustments + ChargeBackAdjustments + ATMFee + FxFee + OtherFee + OpeningBalance

session_notes_batch16: Batch 16 completed (wiki-only mode, live MCP). 4 objects. eMoney_AM_Target: 31 cols, HASH(GCID) HEAP, 385,299,024 rows 2023-07-01 to 2026-04-11; SP_eMoney_AM_Target WHILE-loop daily DELETE+INSERT per date; sources Dim_Customer+Dim_Country+Dim_PlayerLevel+Dim_Manager+eMoney_Dim_Country_Rollout+Fact_CustomerAction (ActionTypeID=7, FundingTypeID=33=eMoney); 3 MIMO windows (LT/3M/Monthly); Euro/GBP/Non-Euro classification from hardcoded CountryID lists; AM assignment from Dim_Manager JOIN; contact dates (Attemp_Date, Contacted_Date) disabled — hardcoded 1900-01-01; SP commented out (SP 13 in Execute_Group_One); 2 T1 (GCID←Customer.CustomerStatic, CID←RealCID Dim_Customer) / 29 T2; 8.8/10. eMoney_Marketing_EmailTracking: 16 cols, HASH(CampaignNumber) HEAP, 0 rows (table empty/suspended); SP_eMoney_Marketing_EmailTracking hardcoded whitelist ~20 campaign numbers (UK/EU IBAN acquisitions); sources BI_DB_SFMC_Report+SendJobs+Dim_Customer+Fact_SnapshotCustomer+eMoney_Dim_Account+eMoney_Panel_FirstDates; 3-day conversion window; UNION second branch no campaign filter (potential bug); SP commented out (SP 12); 0 T1 / 16 T2; 8.5/10. eMoney_UserData_Marketing: 13 cols, HASH(RealCID) HEAP, 2,010,838 rows (1 per GCID/GCID_Unique_Count=1); SP_eMoney_UserData_Marketing TRUNCATE+INSERT with idempotency guard (MaxDate>=today return); Date_Inserted=AccountCreateDate (misleading naming); CardUsage=TxTypeID IN (1,2,3,4,9), IBANUsage=TxTypeID IN (5,6,7,8,13), IBANUsed=IDENTICAL to IBANUsage (redundant); HasTransactionsLast3Months last 90 days; LastCardStatus='NotOrdered' for 95.4% (no card customers, sentinel not in eMoney_Dictionary_CardStatus); SP commented out (SP 11); 3 T1 (GCID←dbo.FiatAccount, RealCID←Customer.CustomerStatic, CardId←dbo.FiatCards) / 10 T2; 8.9/10. v_eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary: View, 17 cols (passthrough from eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary, MaskedPAN excluded); same 130,301 rows, 94,556 distinct CIDs; DDL: SELECT all EXCEPT MaskedPAN commented out; no row filter; VIEW files in Views/ subfolder; 4 T1 / 13 T2; 8.9/10. Slot accounting: 2.0+1.0+1.0+0.5=4.5 slots.

objects.name: eMoney_AM_Target
objects.sp_status: SUSPENDED — commented out as SP 13 in SP_eMoney_Execute_Group_One
objects.etl_pattern: WHILE loop daily DELETE+INSERT per Report_Date; starts from MAX(Report_Date)+1
objects.contact_dates_disabled: Attemp_Date and Contacted_Date hardcoded 1900-01-01 — feature disabled
objects.euro_classification: Hardcoded CountryID lists for Euro/GBP/Non-Euro regions

objects.name: eMoney_Marketing_EmailTracking
objects.upstream_wiki: none (SFMC source has no DWH wiki)
objects.sp_status: SUSPENDED — commented out as SP 12 in SP_eMoney_Execute_Group_One
objects.etl_pattern: Full DELETE+INSERT; hardcoded campaign whitelist (~20 UK/EU IBAN campaigns); 3-day conversion window
known_issues: UNION second branch has no CampaignNumber filter — potential duplicate/overcounting bug

objects.name: eMoney_UserData_Marketing
objects.sp_status: SUSPENDED — commented out as SP 11 in SP_eMoney_Execute_Group_One
objects.etl_pattern: TRUNCATE+INSERT with idempotency guard (IF MAX(UpdateDate) >= CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) RETURN)
objects.grain: One row per GCID (GCID_Unique_Count=1 filter from eMoney_Dim_Account)
known_issues: Date_Inserted = AccountCreateDate (misleading column name, not row insert timestamp)
IBANUsed is 100% identical to IBANUsage (redundant column — legacy artifact)
LastCardStatus='NotOrdered' sentinel (95.4% of rows) not present in eMoney_Dictionary_CardStatus → JOINs to dictionary will fail for these rows

objects.name: v_eMoney_Card_Instance_Summary
objects.view_pattern: Column-projection view — SELECT all from base table EXCEPT MaskedPAN (PII excluded via comment)
objects.uc_target: _Not_Migrated (view-level UC export not configured; base table has UC Gold target)

session_notes_batch17: Batch 17 completed (wiki-only mode, live MCP). FINAL BATCH — all 48 active eMoney_dbo objects now documented. 4 objects. eMoney_Client_Balance_Check_Exceptions_Gap: 3 cols, ROUND_ROBIN HEAP, 0 rows (EXPECTED — HAVING filter means rows only when reconciliation fails); SP_eMoney_Client_Balance_Check_Exceptions_Gap TRUNCATE+INSERT daily from eMoneyClientBalance.CheckCalc (ClosingPositiveBalanceCalc+ClosingNegativeBalanceBO-ClosingBalanceBO); both check SPs called at lines 1002-1003 of SP_eMoney_ClientBalance; 0 T1/3 T2; 8.5/10. eMoney_Client_Balance_Check_Opening_Balance: 3 cols, ROUND_ROBIN HEAP, 0 rows (EXPECTED); typo 'Openning_Balance_Gap' (double n) in DDL preserved; source = eMoneyClientBalance.OpeningBalanceGAP; companion to Exceptions_Gap; 0 T1/3 T2; 8.5/10. eMoneyProcessStatusLog: 5 cols, ROUND_ROBIN HEAP, 16,726 rows 2022-11-23 to 2023-10-30; FROZEN — all 15 SP calls in SP_eMoney_Execute_Group_One commented out 2023-10-30 by Katy F; individual SPs still run via separate scheduling (eMoney_Dim_Account UpdateDate=2026-04-13) but no longer log here; CATCH block lines 153-154 still active; append-only INSERT; 17 distinct ProcessName values; Start=8377/Complete=8317/Fail=32; 0 T1/5 T2; 9.0/10. v_eMoney_Dim_Account: View, 78 cols (11 base-table cols excluded: RegAccountProgram*, HasAccount*Changed, AccountPropertiesTime/Date, CountAccountProgram/SubProgramChanges, Entity); 0 rows on non-refresh days (date filter: WHERE CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)=MAX(UpdateDate)); last refresh 2026-04-13; TOP(1000) without ORDER BY (non-deterministic); all 78 descriptions verbatim from eMoney_Dim_Account.md (snapshot stats stripped from RegulationID); 27 T1/51 T2; UC=_Not_Migrated; 8.9/10. Slot accounting: 0.5+0.5+1.0+2.0=4.0 slots.

batch_17.schema_completion: FINAL BATCH — all 48 active objects documented

objects.name: v_eMoney_Dim_Account
